DISCOVERY 301, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BARBARA MCGRATH'S MOTION TO QUASH DEFENDANT'S DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS IS GRANTED AS TO MEDICAL BILLING RECORDS AND EMPLOYMENT RECORDS AS OVERBROAD. DENIED AS TO MEDICAL RECORDS REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT UPPER EXTREMITY, WORKER'S COMPENSATION RECORDS CONCERNING THIS CLAIM, AND RECORDS SHOWING ACTUAL PAYMENTS. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED

Ntc And Motion To Quash Deft'S Deposition Subpoena
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ERIC R. GRUBER OF JONES & CLIFFORD LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 431-5310 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL F. AVILA OF THE AVILA & PEROS, TEL. NO. (310) 792-7062 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BARBARA MCGRATH'S Motion To Quash Defendant's Deposition Subpoenas for Production of Business Records is Granted as to medical billing records and employment records as overbroad. Denied as to medical records regarding Plaintiff's right upper extremity, worker's compensation records concerning this claim, and records showing actual payments. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
